description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the cnam/make-builder:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and set DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs in this stage on a runner tagged docker. The job executes the script command `make test release IMAGE=registry.gitlab.com/leanlabsio/kanban TAG=${CI_BUILD_REF:0:12} REGISTRY_USERNAME=gitlab-ci-token REGISTRY_PASSWORD=$CI_BUILD_TOKEN` and after the script runs `make clean`. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
